nasb.text: ‘Thus you shall say to Joseph, “Please forgive, I beg you, the transgression of your brothers and their sin, for they did you wrong.” ’ And now, please forgive the transgression of the servants of the God of your father.” And Joseph wept when they spoke to him.

esv.text: ‘Say to Joseph, “Please forgive the transgression of your brothers and their sin, because they did evil to you.”’ And now, please forgive the transgression of the servants of the God of your father.” Joseph wept when they spoke to him.

cnv.text: ‘你們要對約瑟這樣說：從前你的哥哥們惡待你，求你饒恕他們的過犯和罪惡。現在求你饒恕你父親的　神之眾僕人的過犯。’”約瑟聽見這話就哭了。

ccb.text: ‘从前你哥哥们恶待你，求你饶恕他们的罪恶和过犯。’我们是你父亲的上帝的仆人，求你饶恕我们的罪恶。”约瑟听见这些话，就哭了。

csbs.text: ‘你们要对约瑟这样说：从前你哥哥们恶待你，求你饶恕他们的过犯和罪恶。’现在求你饶恕你父亲之神的仆人们的过犯。”他们对约瑟说这话时，约瑟就哭了。
